value.body:
## Context

Developers need to process batches of work quickly, especially inbox items and backlog lists.

## Outcome

Issue lists and inbox views support multi-select plus bulk status, priority, label, assignee, archive/read, and sync-safe mutation flows.

## Acceptance criteria

- Users can select multiple rows using mouse and keyboard patterns.
- Bulk actions validate repository scope and show a clear confirmation when destructive.
- Partial failures are reported per item and successful updates remain visible.
- Inbox bulk read/unread/archive behavior remains compatible with existing inbox mutations.
- Tests cover selection, action availability, optimistic updates, and partial failure handling.

frontmatter.title: Add bulk triage actions for issue lists and inbox

value.title: Add bulk triage actions for issue lists and inbox
